title: House 2 rating card — camera-ask have YOU walked a dog
prompt:
Cast (Halloween night):
- @Sara: 7yo, FAIRY-PRINCESS COSTUME — silver tiara, pink-white ombre tutu w/ crystal bodice, glittery wings, fairy wand + jack-o-lantern bucket. Wavy dark-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes.
- @Eva: 3yo, PUMPKIN-ONESIE COSTUME — round orange pumpkin body w/ carved jack-o-lantern face on tummy, green leaf-stem hat, tiny pumpkin treat bucket. Curly bright-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes.
- @Joe: fluffy cream-and-gold POMERANIAN dog in red-with-black-spots LADYBUG body costume.

Camera: static medium-wide, eye-level — matches the closing frame of clip 7 with Papa now off-frame, family stepped softly off the lawn.

Scene: @ep15_house2_pirate_ship — porch barrels, fishnet drape, and friendly cartoon skull-and-crossbones flag soft-blurred background, soft pumpkin-orange porch glow.

0:0-0:2 — Static medium-wide. @Sara center-left holding a small paper rating card softly at chest height — five star outlines, all five colored in pink kid-marker. @Eva center-right with @Joe's blue leash in her right hand, tiny pumpkin bucket against her left forearm. @Joe standing calm at Eva's left side.

0:2-0:4 — Slow dolly push in to a medium on @Sara's rating card. @Sara lifts the card a touch forward. @Eva does a tiny in-place happy bounce. @Sara: "Pirate ship is FIVE STARS! But Joe almost ate the candy!"

0:4-0:6 — Cut to medium-close on @Eva. @Eva: "Silly Joe!"

0:6-0:8 — Slow pan right back to @Sara, who turns toward camera and breaks the fourth wall. @Sara holds the rating card just slightly forward toward the lens. @Sara, softly to camera: "Have YOU ever walked a dog?"

0:8-1:0 — Slow pull back to opening medium-wide. @Eva, softly to camera: "It's so FUN!" @Joe's tail wags faster.

Lighting: warm pumpkin-orange porch glow, gentle Halloween-night ambience.
Style: Pixar 3D feature-render, cinematic kid-show, NOT scary.
negativePrompt: duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same, mirrored figure, second father, two Papa, identical adults, second mother, two Mama, mama visible, papa visible, third child, second sister, second sara, second eva, two eva, duplicate eva, three girls, fourth child, fifth child, additional children, extra child in background, ghost figure, ghost kid, ghost children, shadow children, shadow of person, mirrored children, mirror reflection, family members in the background, strangers, crowd, group of people, other faces, background people, friends, neighbors, extra neighbors, three arms, third arm, extra arm, extra hand, floating hand, anatomy error, scary face, frightening expression, horror lighting, scary monster, real monster, monstrous teeth, fangs, claws, papa angry, papa thundering shout, papa apoplectic, papa rage face, intense yelling, blood, red liquid, red splatter, red stain, red ink on card, red rating card marks, red stars, gore, injury, scary, violent, distressing, motion lines, action lines, dust trails, speed lines, motion blur, papa with hair, papa not bald, eva with brown hair, eva with red hair, eva brunette, sara in ponytail, sara with straight hair, morphing, flickering, disfigured, distorted, extra face, unstable motion, papa standing still, papa motionless, papa idle, papa observing without acting, papa waiting passively, joe airborne, joe leaping, sara airborne, eva airborne, ginger visible, ginger in this clip, pirate visible, second dog, two joe, eva running, sara running, dutch angle, handheld shake, whip pan, jump cut
cameraStyle: static medium-wide into a slow dolly push, one cut to medium-close on Eva, capped by a slow pan right and slow pull back for the camera-ask
closingFrame: Medium-wide a few feet from the pirate-ship porch — @Sara center-left holding the all-pink-stars rating card softly to camera; @Eva center-right grinning to camera with @Joe's leash in her right hand and pumpkin bucket on her left forearm; @Joe standing calm at Eva's left side in bug costume, tail mid-wag; soft pumpkin-orange porch glow.
